items.headline: With voting over, here’s how the All-Star teams are selected

news_items.headline: MLB hands Cavalli, Contreras 7-game suspensions
news_items.summary: Cade Cavalli and Willson Contreras each have been suspended seven games for their roles in a benches-clearing brawl at Fenway Park on Tuesday night. Miles Mikolas received a five-game suspension, and Red Sox outfielder Nate Eaton got a three-game ban.

news_items.headline: Braves sign OF McCutchen to minor league deal
news_items.summary: The Braves signed past NL MVP outfielder Andrew McCutchen to a minor league contract on Friday in their ongoing search for a veteran who can provide offensive help.

news_items.headline: Padres' Vasquez taken to hospital after fainting
news_items.summary: Padres right-hander Randy Vasquez was in stable condition after fainting following his abbreviated start Thursday night against the Dodgers, manager Craig Stammen said.

news_items.headline: Misiorowski's ASG status in doubt due to schedule
news_items.summary: Brewers ace Jacob Misiorowski is in line to start the Sunday before the All-Star break, which would make him ineligible to pitch in the All-Star Game two nights later.

news_items.headline: Rushing to catch Ohtani's start Friday vs. Padres
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani will be in the Dodgers' lineup when he makes his pitching start Friday, and catching him will be Dalton Rushing.

news_items.headline: M's Rodriguez exits after throw hits back of helme...
news_items.summary: Mariners center fielder Julio Rodriguez was removed from Thursday's 1-0 win over the Angels after being hit in the back of the helmet by a thrown ball and was placed in concussion protocol.

news_items.headline: Chicago Cubs vs. St. Louis Cardinals preview, Friday 7/3, 3:05 CT
news_items.summary: The Cubs and Cards begin a three-game series.

news_items.headline: Red Sox start road trip in Anaheim to face Angels as Contreras suspension looms large
news_items.summary: After a feel-good four-game sweep of the Yankees, the Washington Nationals were the next challenge and after winning game one the Sox crashed hard. We don’t need to go into the next two games eccept for the impact on the road trip: No Willson Contreras, essentially. For the most important stretch of the season remaining […]

news_items.headline: Logan Webb wins his first Pitcher of the Month Award
news_items.summary: Webb keeps adding to his resume and demonstrating to everybody that his knee is fine and he’s still awesome.

news_items.headline: Friday Jays Notes
news_items.summary: Shi Davidi tells us that Kazuma Okamoto was named AL Rookie of the Month. Only slightly unfair, as he’s not a 30-year-old rookie who played several seasons in the majors in Japan. But we aren’t going have many guy get awards, this year, so lets enjoy. Okamoto had 7 home runs, 20 RBI, 4 doubles […]
